# Move functions matching regex: source loses them and unused imports,
# sink gains them and required imports.
exec sflit -source big.go -sink small.go -regex '^Filter' -move
cmp small.go expected_small.go
cmp big.go expected_big.go

-- big.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
func Other()   {}
-- expected_big.go --
package p

func Other() {}
-- expected_small.go --
package p

import "fmt"

func FilterA() { fmt.Println("a") }
